message:
test: add fixture files for 5 newer providers and update beads tracking

Add simple fixture files for ClawdBot, Factory, OpenClaw, PiAgent,
and Vibe providers under tests/fixtures/. Update beads issue tracker
to close CI tasks (bd-1bh.18, bd-1bh.20, bd-1bh.21) and mark the
fixture corpus track (bd-1bh.5) as in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
